title: Install a Replacement Pneumatic Valve
summary: Mount and reconnect a replacement pneumatic valve, reinstall the valve cover and any removed side panels, and restart the operator station using the referenced source procedure.
when_to_use: Use this procedure for the installation portion of pneumatic valve replacement after the old valve has been removed and a replacement valve is ready to be mounted and reconnected.
not_for: Do not use for pneumatic valve removal.
Do not use when the three air lines cannot be confidently returned to their original locations.
Do not use when the referenced 'Starting The Operator Station' procedure on page 66 is not available to the user.

responsibilities: Reconnect the air lines and M8 electrical connector.
Reinstall the valve cover and any removed side panels.
Restart the operator station using the referenced procedure on page 66.

safety_notes: Take care not to pinch any wires along the edges while installing the valve cover.
Ensure the container sensor grommet is in place during valve cover installation.
Stop if the three air lines cannot be confidently returned to their original locations.
access_or_tools_needed: Four (4) M4 socket head screws for the valve cover
Access to the three air line connections
Access to the M8 electrical connector
Access to the top and/or bottom side panels if removed
Referenced 'Starting The Operator Station' procedure on page 66

access_required: Access to the pneumatic valve mounting location
Access to the air line connections
Access to the M8 electrical connector
Access to the valve cover area
Access to the top and/or bottom side panels if they were removed
system_preconditions: The replacement pneumatic valve is available for installation.
The original valve has already been removed.
Any removed panels or covers are available for reinstallation.
external_references: Starting The Operator Station procedure on page 66

visual_references.description: Pneumatic valve location and valve cover / connector identification for replacement context.

steps.title: Mount the replacement valve
steps.purpose: Secure the replacement pneumatic valve in its installed position.
steps.instruction: Mount the new valve using the two (2) M4 socket head screws.
steps.expected_result: The replacement valve is mounted in the correct location.
steps.healthy_condition: The valve is physically secured with the two M4 socket head screws.
steps.failure_condition: The valve cannot be mounted or the required mounting screws are not available.

actions.label: Mount valve
actions.exact_action: Mount the new valve using the two (2) M4 socket head screws.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Valve location and surrounding installation area for pneumatic valve replacement context.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the replacement valve cannot be mounted securely with the two M4 socket head screws.

source_evidence.text: Mount the new valve using the two (2) M4 socket head screws.

source_evidence.note: Related pneumatic valve figure available in packet for valve identification and location context.

steps.title: Reconnect the air lines
steps.purpose: Restore pneumatic connections to the replacement valve.
steps.instruction: Reconnect the three (3) air lines, making sure they are connected in their original location.
steps.expected_result: All three air lines are reconnected to their original locations.
steps.healthy_condition: Each of the three air lines is connected in its original location.
steps.failure_condition: One or more air lines cannot be confidently matched to the original location.

actions.label: Reconnect air lines
actions.exact_action: Reconnect the three (3) air lines, making sure they are connected in their original location.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Valve area and nearby connection context that may help identify the pneumatic valve connection region.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the three air lines cannot be confidently returned to their original locations.

source_evidence.text: Reconnect the three (3) air lines, making sure they are connected in their original location.
Stop if the three air lines cannot be confidently returned to their original locations.

steps.title: Reconnect the M8 electrical connector
steps.purpose: Restore the electrical connection to the replacement pneumatic valve.
steps.expected_result: The M8 electrical connector is reattached to the valve.
steps.healthy_condition: The M8 electrical connector is connected at the valve.
steps.failure_condition: The M8 electrical connector cannot be reconnected or its connection point cannot be identified.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Valve edge / connector area for M8 electrical connector identification.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the M8 electrical connector cannot be reconnected to the valve.

source_evidence.note: Artifact retrieval text states the M8 electrical connector is connected at the edge of the valve in the related pneumatic valve procedure context.

steps.title: Install the valve cover
steps.purpose: Restore the protective cover over the valve assembly.
steps.instruction: Mount the valve cover using the four (4) M4 socket head screws.
steps.expected_result: The valve cover is reinstalled over the valve assembly.
steps.healthy_condition: The valve cover is mounted with the four M4 socket head screws.
steps.failure_condition: The valve cover cannot be installed or the required cover screws are not available.

actions.label: Mount valve cover
actions.exact_action: Mount the valve cover using the four (4) M4 socket head screws.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Valve cover area and cover fastener context.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the valve cover cannot be mounted securely with the four M4 socket head screws.

source_evidence.text: Mount the valve cover using the four (4) M4 socket head screws.

source_evidence.note: Artifact retrieval text references four M4 socket-head screws holding the valve cover in the related pneumatic valve procedure context.

steps.title: Verify wire routing and grommet placement during cover installation
steps.purpose: Prevent installation damage and ensure the cover area is restored correctly.
steps.instruction: While installing the valve cover, take care not to pinch any wires along the edges and ensure the container sensor grommet is in place.
steps.expected_result: No wires are pinched and the container sensor grommet is in place.
steps.healthy_condition: Wires are clear of the cover edges and the container sensor grommet is properly in place.
steps.failure_condition: Wires may be pinched during cover installation or the container sensor grommet is not in place.

actions.label: Check wire routing
actions.exact_action: Take care not to pinch any wires along the edges while installing the valve cover.

actions.label: Check grommet placement
actions.exact_action: Ensure the container sensor grommet is in place.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if wires may be pinched during cover installation.
Stop if the container sensor grommet is not in place.

source_evidence.text: While installing the valve cover, take care not to pinch any wires along the edges and ensure the container sensor grommet is in place.
Stop if wires may be pinched during cover installation.
Stop if the container sensor grommet is not in place.

steps.title: Reinstall removed side panels
steps.purpose: Return the assembly to its normal enclosed condition if access panels were removed.
steps.instruction: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.
steps.expected_result: Any removed top and/or bottom side panels are reinstalled.
steps.healthy_condition: Required side panels are back in place.
steps.failure_condition: A removed side panel cannot be reinstalled.

actions.label: Reinstall side panels
actions.exact_action: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if any removed top and/or bottom side panel cannot be reinstalled.

source_evidence.text: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

steps.title: Restart the operator station
steps.purpose: Return the operator station to service using the referenced source procedure.
steps.instruction: Re-start the operator station using the referenced 'Starting The Operator Station' procedure on page 66.
steps.expected_result: The operator station restart procedure is initiated using the referenced manual section.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station is restarted using the referenced procedure on page 66.
steps.failure_condition: The referenced restart procedure is not available to the user.

actions.label: Restart operator station
actions.exact_action: Re-start the operator station using the referenced 'Starting The Operator Station' procedure on page 66.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the source-required restart procedure on page 66 is not available to the user.

source_evidence.text: Re-start the operator station using the referenced 'Starting The Operator Station' procedure on page 66.
Escalate if the source-required restart procedure on page 66 is not available to the user.
The restart step is source-referenced to another procedure but not expanded here because its detailed steps are not included in this source section.

success_criteria: The replacement pneumatic valve is installed.
The three air lines are restored to their original locations.
The M8 electrical connector is reconnected.
The valve cover is reinstalled with the four M4 socket head screws.
No wires are pinched and the container sensor grommet is in place.
Any removed top and/or bottom side panels are reinstalled.
The operator station is restarted using the referenced procedure on page 66.
healthy_conditions: The valve is securely mounted using the two M4 socket head screws.
Air and electrical connections are restored.
The valve cover is installed without pinching wires.
The container sensor grommet is in place.
The assembly is returned to its installed condition.
failure_conditions: The three air lines cannot be confidently returned to their original locations.
Wires may be pinched during cover installation.
The container sensor grommet is not in place.
The referenced 'Starting The Operator Station' procedure on page 66 is not available to the user.
escalation_guidance: Stop work if the three air lines cannot be confidently returned to their original locations.
Stop work if wires may be pinched during cover installation.
Stop work if the container sensor grommet is not in place.
Escalate if the referenced restart procedure on page 66 is not available.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Pneumatic valve location, valve cover area, and connector identification context.
